response:
VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: I recalculated the individual operations that are independent at each step (rotations, XORs, ANDs and the 32-bit modular additions) and compared them with the values shown in the trace.  
• Round 0: S1, ch and S0 (L0070–L0077) as well as the four successive additions that build temp1 and temp2 (L0072–L0078) were recomputed and match exactly.  
• Round 1: identical check, S1 and ch (L0084–L0085) and all additions through temp1 / temp2 (L0086–L0092) match.  
• Round 3: same for S1, ch, S0 (L0112, L0113, L0118) and the addition chain (L0114–L0120).  
• Mid-trace cross-check – Round 30 (L0490–L0499) and Round 40 (L0630–L0639): every rotation, XOR and the four chained additions again reproduce the listed results.  
• Late rounds – Round 60 (L0910–L0919) and the last round 63 (L0952–L0960): rotations S1/S0, ch/maj and all modular sums are correct.  

Because all recomputed values coincide with the trace, no single-bit discrepancy appears anywhere; therefore no tamper point exists and the trace is genuine.
